packs.title: Traditional HK Chinese basics
packs.activity: Flashcards + matching + comparison + audio prompts + listen/repeat
packs.next: Expand family words into colours, numbers, greetings, Jyutping, matching practice, comparison drills, and audio prompts.
progressionSteps: Start with family words and greetings
Practise colours, numbers, and Jyutping recall
Move into matching practice, comparison drills, audio prompts, and short household phrases

packs.title: Simplified Mandarin basics
packs.activity: Flashcards + matching + comparison + audio prompts + listen/repeat
packs.next: Expand into matching practice, audio prompts, and Traditional/Simplified comparison drills.
progressionSteps: Start with greetings and core family words
Compare Simplified, Traditional, and Pinyin forms
Use matching practice and comparison drills, then try audio prompts

packs.title: Maths Foundation practice
packs.activity: Practice cards + mental maths + confidence drills
packs.next: Add adaptive answer entry, number-line visuals, and learner-specific weak-skill rotation.
progressionSteps: Start with number bonds to 10 and 20
Practise place value and skip counting
Move into times tables, fractions, and short word problems
